_comment: Copy to .agents/mcp_config.json (gitignored) and customize relay, fff-mcp, and project paths.

pixellab._note: Set PIXELLAB_API_KEY in repo-root .env and User env (HTTP MCP cannot load envFile).

project-twelve-graphify-mcp._note: Requires graphify-out/graph.json. Install: uv tool install "graphifyy[mcp]"; build: graphify extract . --code-only.
